rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding outputs to inputs via implementation-level ports or subcomponent connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries by placing contracts in the scope that matches the visibility of referenced features.
Only reference features or ports that are explicitly exposed at the current scope level (type or implementation).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE annex syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Relate outputs to inputs using direct variable names, not subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent port names in component type annexes.
